reviews.comment:
Exelente atencion de todos su personal. Siempre que pasamos x el lugar cargamos allí ya q es ypf acá y somos socios. El parque bien cuidado. Para descansar y seguir camino. Super recomendables.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from all the staff. We always fill up there when we're passing by, since it's a YPF station here and we're members. The park is well-maintained. A great place to rest before continuing our journey. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBcV9YNF9nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar para parar amplio parque, limpio.Bar chiquito pero con aire acondicionado

(Translated by Google)
Nice place to stop, large park, clean. Small bar but with air conditioning

reviews.comment:
Los baños muy limpios ,y dato no menor tenían jabón líquido para lavarse las manos . 👌🏻👌🏻

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were very clean, and importantly, they had liquid soap for washing hands. 👌🏻👌🏻

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias Belén por elegirnos y por su puntuación

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención tanto en combustibles como en el kiosco. Baños muy limpios!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service both at the gas station and the convenience store. Very clean restrooms!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfeTVTd2p3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Un hermoso espacio para parar y descansar a la sombra de una linda arboleda, en unas mesas que están repartidas por el lugar.
Ya sea lleves comida o compres en el autoservicio de la estación, un buen sitio para estirar las piernas, ir al baño muy limpio, y continuar a destino.

(Translated by Google)
A lovely spot to stop and rest in the shade of a beautiful grove of trees, at tables scattered throughout the area.
Whether you bring your own food or buy something at the station's convenience store, it's a great place to stretch your legs, use the very clean restroom, and continue on your way.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfdWVqZHhRRRAB
